name: Chafà Cafe and Studio | Pune - Facebook
snippet: Beat the summer heat the Chafá way! 🌱 Made with activated charcoal, lemon and honey, this refreshing drink may help support digestion, reduce bloating and assist the body in flushing out toxins. Paired with naturally antioxidant-rich lemon and the goodness of honey.

name: Chafa Cafe And Studio in Bavdhan,Pune - Order Food Online
snippet: Nestled near Near Suryadatta College in Bavdhan, Chafa Cafe And Studio is a convenient stop for both locals and visitors exploring the city. The restaurant’s interior is elegantly designed to provide a cozy yet refined ambiance, with warm lighting and tasteful decor that make every meal feel special.
